description.description: Optional Japanese definition-style clue for recall: clear meaning, natural contexts, register or formality, tone, common pairings, and contrast with similar words, phrased without naming the target word.

allOf.description: Japanese word or expression to import. Furigana notation: add each kanji reading in square brackets immediately after that kanji, with no spaces, for example 資[し]金[きん]. Do not group readings after a multi-kanji word. For kana-only words, write the word as-is.

Plain translations for this Japanese word, separated by semicolons and a single space, with no semicolon at the end. Example: qualifications; requirements; capabilities. Do not include explanations, sentences, numbering, or extra notes.
Words to import into the word library.

title: Word import JSON
description: JSON payload for importing Japanese vocabulary words into the word library.
